name: io.github.Runewardd/runeward
description: Governed execution cells for AI agents: provision isolated Docker/Kubernetes sandboxes from declarative TOML profiles and run shell, Python, Node, and file tools through a policy engine, tamper-evident audit ledger, cost/loop guardrails, and human-in-the-loop approval gates.

runtimeArguments.description: Start the runeward MCP server on stdio.

environmentVariables.name: RUNEWARD_CONFIG_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory to resolve profile TOML files from (optional; defaults to the standard search path).

environmentVariables.name: RUNEWARD_STATE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory where the tamper-evident audit ledger is written (optional).

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token for the runeward control plane, if it is configured to require auth.
